response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio is predominantly conversational English and Japanese, which aligns with the Reference JSON's finding that no vocal music was present. 2. JSON Usage: The Reference JSON was used to confirm the context (merchandise presentation), but manual transcription and translation were required for all spoken dialogue. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are tightly anchored to vocal bursts. Japanese dialogue is transcribed in 'og' and translated in 'en', while English dialogue is kept consistent in both fields. Aggressive truncation was applied during rapid-fire exchanges to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: Everything in the concert was beautiful, wasn't it?
subtitles.english: Everything in the concert was beautiful, wasn't it?

subtitles.original: Yeah, it was! It was really beautiful!
subtitles.english: Yeah, it was! It was really beautiful!

subtitles.original: Okayuzu English Challenge!
Cyan symbolizes sincerity and self-acceptance.
You don't have to try to be strong...
subtitles.english: You don't have to try to be strong...

subtitles.original: ...or try to be perfect.
Just accept yourself as you are...
subtitles.english: Just accept yourself as you are...

subtitles.original: ...and go with the flow, and you'll be fine.
subtitles.english: ...and go with the flow, and you'll be fine.

subtitles.original: Can I be strong?
Strong cat! Strong cat!
I wanna be a strong big cat!
subtitles.english: I wanna be a strong big cat!

subtitles.original: Big cat! Yay!
Raora strong cat!
Thank you senpais for your nice words. Thank you!
subtitles.english: Thank you senpais for your nice words. Thank you!

subtitles.original: Thank you! Thank you!
心に響きました
良かったわ。良かった良かった。
Then, from here...
...I've got some exciting news for you guys!
subtitles.english: ...I've got some exciting news for you guys!

subtitles.original: It's about Raora Panthera Birthday Celebration 2026!
subtitles.english: It's about Raora Panthera Birthday Celebration 2026!

subtitles.original: So please senpai help me out, okay?
subtitles.english: So please senpai help me out, okay?

subtitles.original: Okay!
グッズ紹介、お手伝いします！
subtitles.english: We'll help with the merch intro!

subtitles.original: 任せて！
Okay, so, Raora Panthera Birthday Anniversary 2026!
subtitles.english: Okay, so, Raora Panthera Birthday Anniversary 2026!

subtitles.original: Goods are now on sale!
Okay, okay, let's go, let's go!
subtitles.english: Okay, okay, let's go, let's go!

subtitles.original: Let's go!
Take a look here!
こちらどうぞ！
Whoa! Wow!
So gorgeous! Look at this illustration, I like it!
subtitles.english: So gorgeous! Look at this illustration, I like it!

subtitles.original: 好き！
すごーい、かわいい！
みんなかわいいよ！
The illustration was drawn by Komiya-sensei!
subtitles.english: The illustration was drawn by Komiya-sensei!

subtitles.original: Thank you so much for making this beautiful art! I'm so happy!
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for making this beautiful art! I'm so happy!

subtitles.original: 胡宮先生に描いてもらったみたいですね。
subtitles.english: It seems Komiya-sensei drew this for us.

subtitles.original: ライブのRaoraをテーマに描いてもらったみたいですね。
subtitles.english: It looks like she drew it with 'Live Raora' as the theme.

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！
Okay, so let's take a closer look at the details!
subtitles.english: Okay, so let's take a closer look at the details!

subtitles.original: First up, this one!
Whoa!
B-Day Live Long T-shirt!
ロンTシャツ！
It features a motif logo on the back...
subtitles.english: It features a motif logo on the back...

subtitles.original: ...and there's also design on the sleeves...
subtitles.english: ...and there's also design on the sleeves...

subtitles.original: ...so it's really, really cool for everyday life! So please check it out!
subtitles.english: ...so it's really, really cool for everyday life! So please check it out!

subtitles.original: かわいい！ロゴとかも付いててね...
subtitles.english: Cute! It has a logo and everything...

subtitles.original: ...いっぱいデザインが凝っててかわいい！
subtitles.english: ...the design is so detailed and cute!

subtitles.original: ねー、すごいすごい！
And next, we have... Ta-da!
Body bag!
ボディバッグ！
And it's a bag designed for everyday use...
subtitles.english: And it's a bag designed for everyday use...

subtitles.original: ...that lets you show off your love for Big Cat!
subtitles.english: ...that lets you show off your love for Big Cat!

subtitles.original: Big Cat! Big Cat! Big Cat!
subtitles.english: Big Cat! Big Cat! Big Cat!

subtitles.original: ラオーラ推しアピールできる、普段使いできるバッグになっております！
subtitles.english: It's a bag for everyday use where you can show you're a Raora fan!

subtitles.original: 素晴らしい！ありがとう！
Next up is... Ta-da!
Cry, Cry Chattini!
おしおきチャッティーニ！
Chattini! Doshita no Chattini?
That's what you deserve! That's what you get!
subtitles.english: That's what you deserve! That's what you get!

subtitles.original: Sorry, sorry! That's what you get!
subtitles.english: Sorry, sorry! That's what you get!

subtitles.original: まあまあまあ...
Crying Chattini, that comes with an amazing pouch!
subtitles.english: Crying Chattini, that comes with an amazing pouch!

subtitles.original: Next please! Next please!
Ta-da!
Kawaii!
Perfect! You can combine them together! So good!
subtitles.english: Perfect! You can combine them together! So good!

subtitles.original: チャッティーニが洗濯機の中に閉じ込められちゃったみたいです！
subtitles.english: It looks like Chattini got trapped inside the washing machine!

subtitles.original: Wash wash Chattini!
ぐるぐる、ぐるぐる！
はい、こちら、チャッティーニが閉じ込められてるのは、ぬいぐるみ用のマルチポーチですね。
subtitles.english: Yes, this one where Chattini is trapped is a multi-pouch for plushies.

subtitles.original: すごいかわいい！
And next up is... Ta-da! Voice Pack!
subtitles.english: And next up is... Ta-da! Voice Pack!

subtitles.original: It's gonna be fun to listen to it, so please check it out!
subtitles.english: It's gonna be fun to listen to it, so please check it out!

subtitles.original: ラオーラがね、頑張って収録したボイス聞いてみてくださいね、皆さんね。
subtitles.english: Everyone, please listen to the voice that Raora worked hard to record.

subtitles.original: お願いします！
And there is also bonus for purchasing all the full set.
subtitles.english: And there is also bonus for purchasing all the full set.

subtitles.original: And here it is!
Whoa!
